title: JDK Vanilla Pack
body:
![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0b1c6f5fc9353eaed830dbd93117988de0e37f1.png) ![fgd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a496d901625f27d3add3c7557c1d0b6620ce93c.png) ![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0b1c6f5fc9353eaed830dbd93117988de0e37f1.png) ### DESCRIPTON: Play **Minecraft** the way it was supposed to be better, but still feeling like the original game you know. This **modpack** makes **Vanilla Minecraft** even better, with mods that fit right in with the game's usual charm. You'll see **small improvements** things that make life easier, and more options all without changing how the game works at its heart. Find a new way to enjoy **survival** in Minecraft where every mod seems like it belongs in the world you already enjoy. ### 📚ABOUT: JDK Vanilla Pack subtly enhances Vanilla Minecraft without losing its familiar style. Discover new features that blend perfectly with classic gameplay, such as: - Slight visual improvements (e.g., more detailed lighting) - Quality-of-life changes (e.g., streamlined crafting systems) - Seamless integration into the Vanilla experience Everything stays familiar, just a little better. # IMPORTANT!!!: For Playing **Muiltyplayer Hosting Server**, please Remove - Fps Reducer - Cherished Worlds ![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0b1c6f5fc9353eaed830dbd93117988de0e37f1.png) ### Enhanced Vanilla Experience: All additions feel like a natural part of the game. **ComplementaryReimagined Shader**
  
With Shaders    Without Shaders
 
![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0b1c6f5fc9353eaed830dbd93117988de0e37f1.png) ### Performance Optimized: Maintains excellent performance without unnecessary strain ![Fps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/412f97d51c4af382c5b550040eb9f8fae41acca1.png) ![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0b1c6f5fc9353eaed830dbd93117988de0e37f1.png) ### Multiplayer Friendly: Works seamlessly solo or with friends! ![Halo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e7d3b77a86c8226024043a6a09f57d9955704a9_0.webp) ![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0b1c6f5fc9353eaed830dbd93117988de0e37f1.png) ![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0b1c6f5fc9353eaed830dbd93117988de0e37f1.png) This Modpack Has Over **150 Mods:**
